title: Tagbilaran Broadcasting System
summary: Tagbilaran Broadcasting System (also known as Community Media Network) is a Philippine radio network. Its corporate office is located at CAP Bldg., J. Borja St. cor. Carlos P. Garcia Ave., Tagbilaran.
text:
Tagbilaran Broadcasting System (also known as Community Media Network) is a Philippine radio network. Its corporate office is located at CAP Bldg., J. Borja St. cor. Carlos P. Garcia Ave., Tagbilaran.
